title: Chapter 6
content:
Chapter 6: Canlis.

Liam arrived at the Canlis, it was on the higher side and appropriate for a date. He felt his heart pounding, he had no idea why he was getting anxious with how smooth the conversation went earlier.

Either way, Liam knew it was one of those things, it was a good thing as a matter of fact.

He looked around and saw the place was mostly cleared out, this was good as it would provide him with a lot more freedom.

And then the door opened to welcome the most beautiful lady he had seen, at least with make-up on.

She looked like something straight out of a magazine, the dress hung on her body perfectly so that it was impossible for the other men in the room not to steal a glance.

The women were no better and this immediately made her feel self conscious, Rachel found herself wishing for the ground to open up and swallow her whole.

However, her eyes met Liams’ and she calmed down right away, a nervous smile replaced her face,

She walked towards him and each step she took, her breasts swayed from left to right in perfect rhythm.

"Fucking hell, she looks good!" Liam thought to himself.

He assumed the dress would look good on her but he had underestimated the size of those weapons of mass destruction.

But more so, he couldn’t believe she actually wore it.

Liam stood up to welcome her, walking towards her to give her a firm hug, the softness pushing against his chest almost made his body react on its own.

"You look stunning! I almost thought I had the wrong lady!" Liam complimented her. He could feel the envious gazes around him.

"Y-You don’t think it is too revealing?" Rachel asked, Liam instantly knew she wasn’t used to wearing something like this.

"People will always look at what they cannot have. The view is mine to enjoy, not them," Liam said, admiring her form.

This made Rachel feel good, this was what she wanted because only Liam’s opinion mattered.

Liam pulled out her chair and she sat, they had a wonderful evening, Liam noticed she was conscious about what she ordered.

She wasn’t reaching for the most expensive thing on the menu but things that she would actually like.

"Rachel, I want to thank you for coming out tonight. Truth be told, I just went through a rough break-up," Liam said but this wasn’t information he should be divulging on the first date.

"... Oh..." Rachel blurted out before awkwardly sitting the drink in front of her.

The awkward silence that followed was loud enough to drown out the sound.

"I want us to be comfortable having these conversations, because I want you to know I’m single..." Liam added, unfazed by the silence.

"Ohhh!" Rachel said again but this time, it was more of an acknowledgment.

"I thought you wanted to tell me you didn’t see this going anywhere and let me down easy," Rachel confessed but Liam chuckled upon hearing that.

"Come on, you dressed up for me... It would be unfair if I didn’t at least help you take that off," Liam said, looking her straight in the eyes and once again.

Rachel broke eye contact and her face flushed red, Liam was so direct.

"You can refuse, I don’t mind waiting..." Liam added but his voice was calm telling her he wouldn’t be mad by whatever she decides.

"Y-You are so direct..." Rachel was barely audible.

"I don’t like wasting time or another man could come and take what should be mine," Liam leaned in with a smirk on his face.

"And I have certainly seen what I would like to be mine tonight," Liam added.

Rachel gulped as she nervously downed the drink in front of her but Liam leaned in his chair.

"So fucking cute," Liam muttered under his breath.

"I-I would like to..." Rachel responded but Liam wanted her to be clear.

"You would like to?" Liam asked despite knowing exactly what she meant.

"I-I wouldn’t mind following you home," Rachel said.

She was nothing like how she texted, but this was the case with most people.

But Liam knew one thing tonight, he would get to see that gorgeous body of hers naked.

-

Sara had been ghosted by the man who she cheated on Liam with but this was something that didn’t faze her because she was a pretty lady.

She could easily find another man but she noticed that Liam hadn’t watched any of her stories today, this was a first.

This made her wonder, Sara had an ego that felt entitled to the validation of other men but Liam was cutting off that supply.

She scoffed and went through his socials, she saw he had been active earlier that day.

Sara almost chuckled because she thought he was trying to punish her but either way, she knew she could get him back whenever she wanted as Liam was a pathetic man.

Or at least, this was what she thought.
